MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant King Security Services Inc.'s motion for terminating sanctions is continued to November 7, 2008 on the Court's own motion so that plaintiffs may comply with the August 4, 2008 order. Supplemental briefing shall be filed and served no later than November 4, 2008 to advise the Court of the status of compliance with the prior order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Elise Hernandez'S Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-24-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant King Security Services Inc.'s motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents (plaintiff Elise Hernandez) is Granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff Elise Hernandez is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections and produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $360 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Roxana Contreras'S Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant King Security Services Inc.'s motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents (plaintiff Roxana Contreras) is Granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff Elise Hernandez is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections and produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $360 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
